item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Cottage Food Reform
item.description:
👀 Federal Cottage Food Reform

Cottage food law preemption 119th Congress: federal baseline for direct-sale home-prepared foods · cooperative-class Freezer Host eligibility provisions. Composes with #1 Lets Make Dinner Freezer Host network + Farm Bill + School Meals. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
